scripts.typecheck: pnpm --dir ../core build && pnpm --dir ../importers build && pnpm --dir ../query build && tsc -p tsconfig.typecheck.json --pretty false
scripts.test: pnpm --dir ../contracts build && pnpm --dir ../core build && pnpm --dir ../importers build && pnpm --dir ../query build && pnpm build && tsx ./scripts/verify-package-shape.ts && vitest run ./test/*.test.ts --no-coverage
